case_title: XIANNA TAM VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAM, XIANNA AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC., A  CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
